# researchPapers

Research paper search, analytics, and RAG demo over a high-citation OpenAlex Computer Science corpus.

## Public pages
- [researchPapers dashboard](https://papers.highsignal.app/)
- [Research digest](https://papers.highsignal.app/digest/)

## Data notes
The RAG demo uses OpenAlex primary Computer Science works with more than 999 citations. It stores metadata, abstracts when available from OpenAlex, citation counts, authors, topics, DOI or landing-page links, and PDF links only.
